text: The person aboard a vessel signaling by raising and lowering his or her outstretched arms to each side is indicating:

options.text: All is clear, it is safe to pass
All is clear, it is safe to approach

explanation: According to the International Aeronautical and Maritime Search and Rescue (IAMSAR) manual and COLREGs Annex IV, this physical gesture is a recognized visual signal of distress.
